hooks.command: if [ -f package.json ]; then npm run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -10; fi
files=$(git diff --name-only -- '*.ts' '*.tsx' '*.cjs' '*.js' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$files" ]; then grep -Hn 'throw new \|TODO\|FIXME\|console\.log' $files 2>/dev/null | head -5; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then if [ -f package.json ]; then npm run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then if git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '^(\.claude/|CLAUDE\.md$|docs/project-state|docs/tech-debt|docs/sprints/|docs/feature-areas/|docs/NOUS_Strategy_v5|docs/NOUS_Development_Roadmap|docs/architecture\.md$|docs/roadmap\.md$)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: constitutional documents staged — only architect/user may commit these'; exit 1; fi; fi
echo 'Session ended. Run: git log --oneline -5 && (test -f package.json && npm run typecheck && npm run test -- --run || echo no package.json yet)'
